title: The Ghast Cow
body:
This mod adds a Mini Boss called The Ghost Cow.
The Ghost Cow (Ghow) can be summoned by making a ghast kill a Cow which has been renamed to "Ghast".

This mod was made in response to a funny online quiz in which it "The Ghost Cow" is one of the choosable answers to the question to the question "Which mob do you fight at the end of the game?"
